title: Custom node credentialTest method fails to register
symptom: The credential test for the custom oraclesql node does not provide any connection message, indicating it has failed to register the test method.
applies_when: Using a custom node loaded from ~/.n8n/custom
Testing credentials for the custom node
not_this_if: The node is packaged and installed correctly
root_cause: When custom nodes are loaded from the specified directory, n8n may not properly register the credentialTest method, leading to failures in testing the connection.
fix_steps: Package the custom node as an npm package with proper metadata
Alternatively, define a test in the credentials file if using HTTP
agent_instruction: Package and install the oraclesql node as an npm package to ensure the credentialTest method is registered.
